'''''Courageous''''' was a [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
The vessel, commanded by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]], operated as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the task force dispatched to attack the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] choke point in the [[Ywllandr system/Legends|Ywllandr system]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (novelization)|''Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith'' novelization]] {{Ab|Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm}}
